name: Executables Stored in OneDrive
description: Detects users storing executable files in OneDrive, which can be a potential indicator of malicious activity, such as preparing for malware deployment or using OneDrive as a staging area for attacks.

prompts.prompt: Executable file detected being stored in OneDrive by a user, indicating potential staging for malicious activity. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **User** {user}, **User ID** {user_id}, **Source IP** {source_ip}, **File Name** {file_name}, **File Extension** {file_extension}, **Destination Folder** {destination_folder}, **URL** {url}. Investigate this suspicious activity for potential malware deployment or data staging.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the file creation/upload event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user who stored the executable file.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The ID of the user, if available.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The IP address from which the file was uploaded.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the executable file.

parameters.name: file_extension
parameters.description: The extension of the executable file.

parameters.name: destination_folder
parameters.description: The OneDrive folder where the file was stored.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the file in OneDrive.
